rationale.R1.2: The agent thoroughly analyzed the argument chain, identifying multiple inconsistencies and proposing detailed repairs.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty was disclosed but not comprehensively for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: Output adhered strictly to the requested scope without deviations.
rationale.RX.4: No harmful content was introduced; output is safe with minor caveats.
rationale.RX.5: Provenance and traceability were partial, lacking detailed annotations.
